description: Complete structured earnings transcript data and recent news for 3 companies across 2024–2026. Covers all available quarters from Q1 2024 through the most recent report. Designed to seed Cortex modules: earnings transcript analyzer, sentiment tracker, IC memo drafter, financial estimate tracker.

companies.name: Nvidia
companies.fiscal_year_note: Nvidia FY ends January. FY2025 = Feb 2024–Jan 2025; FY2026 = Feb 2025–Jan 2026.
primary_themes: Reasoning AI as new scaling law
Sovereign AI — national AI factory buildout
China export controls and geopolitical risk
Agentic AI as next demand driver

companies.name: Tesla
primary_themes: Optimus: lab → factory → commercial production arc
Energy business: structural growth outpacing auto
AI5 chip and TeraFab compute independence
Auto margin recovery vs delivery headwinds

companies.name: Amazon
primary_themes: AWS re-acceleration and AI revenue tripling
Trainium custom silicon vs Nvidia GPU dependency
Anthropic investment and frontier model strategy
Grocery: $150B gross sales, Whole Foods expansion

schema_notes.transcripts: Each entry includes: quarter, date, speakers, financials (key metrics as numbers), key_quotes (speaker + theme + text), key_themes (array of strings), risks (array), tone (descriptive string)
schema_notes.news: Each item includes: date, source, headline, snippet, tags (array)
schema_notes.coverage_gap: Q1 2026 for all three companies not yet reported as of 2026-04-21. Tesla reports 2026-04-22; Amazon reports 2026-04-29; Nvidia ~May 2026.
